message:
feat(metrics): add Prometheus metrics endpoint support

lib.rs:
- Add conditional metrics module export behind "metrics" feature flag

runtime.rs:
- Add getter methods for runtime metrics: ingest_lag_count(),
  ingest_lag_sum_ms(), segments_persisted(), events_recorded()

main.rs:
- Add CLI flags: --metrics, --metrics-bind, --metrics-prefix
- Wire metrics flags into config overrides
- Start MetricsServer when config.metrics.enabled, log bind address
- Graceful shutdown waits for metrics server
- Handle feature-gated build with warning for missing metrics feature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
